sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The blocks appear to be in the same position as before. Let me check the exact position to see if UP 2 moved them.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current block position
after = current_frame

print("=== Orange block ===")
for n in after.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'O':
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\n=== Blue block ===")
for n in after.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 15:
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check area
ascii_lines = after.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Area (rows 25-40, cols 14-30) ===")
for r in range(25, 41):
    row_str = ""
    for c in range(14, 31):
        ch = ascii_lines[r][c]
        if ch == 'c': row_str += '.'
        elif ch == 'G': row_str += '#'
        elif ch == 'O': row_str += 'o'
        elif ch == 'b': row_str += 'b'
        elif ch == 'B': row_str += 'B'
        elif ch == 'W': row_str += '+'
        elif ch == 'w': row_str += ','
        else: row_str += ch
    print(f"{r:2d}: {row_str}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

I need to get the blocks to the white cross. The white cross is below and to the right of the blocks.
Looking at the layout:
- Horizontal bar: rows 25-29, cols 14-52
- Left gray area: rows 30-39, cols 14-23
- White cross: rows 31-33, cols 21-22
The blocks need to be at rows 31-33, cols 21-22 to overlap with the white cross. But the blocks are 5 rows tall (2 rows orange + 3 rows blue) and 5 columns wide.
Wait, I think I need to reconsider what "reaching the target" means. Maybe the goal is to have the blocks positioned such that they overlap with the white cross, or maybe the blocks need to be adjacent to the white cross.
Let me think about this differently. The white cross is at rows 31-33, cols 21-22. The left gray area is at rows 30-39, cols 14-23. The blocks are currently at rows 25-29, cols 14-18 (in the horizontal bar).
To move the blocks into the left gray area, I need to go DOWN. But the left gray area is below the horizontal bar, so DOWN should work.
From rows 25-29, DOWN 2 would move the blocks to rows 35-39 (as we saw before). But I want the blocks to be at rows 31-33, which is in the middle of the left gray area.
Hmm, maybe I need to position the blocks differently. Let me try RIGHT first to move the blocks to cols 19-23 (closer to the white cross at cols 21-22), then DOWN to move into the left gray area.
Actually, wait. The blocks are at cols 14-18. The white cross is at cols 21-22. So I need to move RIGHT 3 to align horizontally. Let me try RIGHT 3 from the horizontal bar.
